44: More specifically, ”Cleopatra VII.”
Her name means ”glory of the father” 
in Greek. She is known as one of the 
greatest beauties ever to live, having 
charmed many with her musical voice 
and conversation skills. It is said
that all of history would have unfolded
differently had even just her nose been
longer or shorter.
[END]
1108: More specifically, ”Cleopatra VII.”
Her name means ”glory of the father” 
in Greek. She is known as one of the 
greatest beauties ever to live, having 
charmed many with her musical voice 
and conversation skills. It is said
that all of history would have unfolded
differently had even just her nose been
longer or shorter.
[END]
